title: Limit doesn't pushdown to tikv automatically
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
drop table if exists t1;
create table t1(c1 int, c2 int, key(c1));
set @@cte_max_recursion_depth = 10000;
insert into t1 with recursive cte1 as (select 1 cola, 1 colb union all select cola+1 as cola, colb+1 as colb from cte1 limit 5000) select * from cte1;
analyze table t1;
explain select * from t1 order by c1 limit 200;
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
limit pushdown to tikv:
```
TiDB root@127.0.0.1:test> explain select * from t1 order by c1 limit 200;
+------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| id                           | estRows | task      | access object          | operator info                       |
+------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| Projection_24                | 200.00  | root      |                        | test.t1.c1, test.t1.c2              |
| └─IndexLookUp_23             | 200.00  | root      |                        | limit embedded(offset:0, count:200) |
|   ├─Limit_22(Build)          | 200.00  | cop[tikv] |                        | offset:0, count:200                 |
|   │ └─IndexFullScan_20       | 200.00  | cop[tikv] | table:t1, index:c1(c1) | keep order:true                     |
|   └─TableRowIDScan_21(Probe) | 200.00  | cop[tikv] | table:t1               | keep order:false                    |
+------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+-------------------------------------+
5 rows in set
```
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
limit didn't pushdown to tikv:
```
TiDB root@127.0.0.1:test> explain select * from t1 order by c1 limit 200;
+--------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+------------------------+
| id                             | estRows | task      | access object          | operator info          |
+--------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+------------------------+
| Limit_14                       | 200.00  | root      |                        | offset:0, count:200    |
| └─Projection_29                | 200.00  | root      |                        | test.t1.c1, test.t1.c2 |
|   └─IndexLookUp_28             | 200.00  | root      |                        |                        |
|     ├─IndexFullScan_26(Build)  | 200.00  | cop[tikv] | table:t1, index:c1(c1) | keep order:true        |
|     └─TableRowIDScan_27(Probe) | 200.00  | cop[tikv] | table:t1               | keep order:false       |
+--------------------------------+---------+-----------+------------------------+------------------------+
5 rows in set
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```
TiDB root@127.0.0.1:test> select tidb_version();
+-----------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                            |
+-----------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v9.0.0-beta.2.pre-415-g9bcae5eff7        |
| Edition: Community                                        |
| Git Commit Hash: 9bcae5eff736a6a6fb230c7865787f9bd85aa652 |
| Git Branch: master                                        |
| UTC Build Time: 2025-09-04 03:31:53                       |
| GoVersion: go1.24.5                                       |
| Race Enabled: false                                       |
| Check Table Before Drop: false                            |
| Store: unistore                                           |
| Kernel Type: Classic                                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------+
```
<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id Int32, name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE age IS NULL;
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM t2 ORDER BY age LIMIT 2;
key_bug_features: Limit not pushed down to tikv during query execution
